channel.title: ts on guhan.me
channel.description: Recent content in ts on guhan.me

item.title: Design Tic Tac Toe
item.description: Low Level Design (LLD) Low level Design problems, are common during SDE Interviews and they are real fun, as the canvas is free to pain with just the size of the canvas (limitations/constrains) discussed by you and your interviewer. But overall it’s a fun exercise. Can we make it an even more fun exercise?? YEAH Fusion of Web with LLD Java Swings, Qt-C,C++,... , tKinter-Python these are complex to build for smaller problems, can we adopt anything easier for visualizing and OOPS fundamentals.
